overview.description: The Leverage Shares 2X Long OSCR Daily ETF (OSCG) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in financials equity. The fund aims to provide 2x leveraged exposure to the daily price movement of Oscar Health Inc. (NYSE: OSCR) stock, less fees, and expenses OSCG was launched on Nov 5, 2025 and is issued by Leverage Shares.
